message:
feat(python): numpy.fliplr wrapper parity (franken_numpy-bs7r)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.fliplr(m) so left/right (axis=1)
column reversal matches numpy. Test covers 2-D column reversal, 3-D
leaving leading axis intact, float dtype preservation, 1-D input
error parity (must raise iff numpy raises), and a cross-check that
fliplr(x) ≡ flip(x, axis=1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
